description_long: This shotgun features a modern, tactical design with a matte black finish and a robust, angular frame. The barrel is elongated and equipped with a prominent top rail, likely for mounting optics or accessories, and displays ribbing along its length for added grip and heat dissipation. The stock is solid and straight, with a dark brown insert that appears to provide ergonomic support and comfort for the shoulder. A lever-action mechanism is clearly visible beneath the receiver, indicating a manual cycling action. The trigger guard is elongated and rounded, providing ample space for gloved fingers and ensuring safety during operation. Accents of blue are present on the receiver, adding a touch of visual contrast to the otherwise dark color scheme.
description: A modern, tactical lever-action shotgun with a matte black finish, ribbed barrel, and ergonomic brown stock insert. Blue accents and a prominent top rail complete its robust appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the ribbed barrel, blue receiver accents, and brown stock insert.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the top rail, with the brown stock visible at the rear.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the lever-action mechanism, ribbed barrel, and ergonomic stock.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's width and the alignment of the barrel and top rail.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with ribbing and a prominent top rail
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard with ample space and smooth contours
